description: Cross-disciplinary learning modules from The-Curriculum-of-Everything-Earth. Each module maps to Rosetta shape families.

modules.name: Pattern Recognition
modules.description: Exploring patterns across nature, mathematics, and art. Resonance and geometry as universal languages.

modules.name: Waves and Oscillation
modules.description: Sound, light, and water waves as expressions of resonance and flow.

modules.name: Networks and Connection
modules.description: Mycelial networks, neural networks, and communication systems. Information flow through connected structures.

modules.name: Geometric Thinking
modules.description: Platonic solids, tessellations, and spatial reasoning. Geometry as the language of structure.

subject_adventures.description: Mathematics as the study of symmetry, pattern, and invariance.
Physics as the study of what is conserved when everything else changes.
Music-mathematics integration. Harmonic series, frequency ratios, and acoustic geometry.
Language evolution and technology as transformation engines.

nature_teachers.description: Subset of nature teachers that map directly to Rosetta ontology entities.
